name: plastron-cms
description: Example CMS app — WordPress-style content table backed by PGLite (Postgres-in-wasm) in the browser. PlastronCMS is a React component (editMode + content + onSave) that hydrates a plastron cel graph for view and edit. The PGLite layer sits behind an API-shaped boundary so the component code is byte-identical to the eventual grafted-into-a-real-React-app deployment.
